Our services

01

VR

Fully immersive virtual reality — product demos, training environments, and interactive worlds on Meta Quest and beyond.

02

AR

Web and app AR layering digital content over the real world — exhibitions, retail, and interactive marketing activations.

03

Game Design

Custom Unity game experiences — serious games for enterprise, branded interactive entertainment, and everything between.

04

Simulation

High-fidelity real-time simulations for training, safety, and decision-making — without the real-world risk.

05

Other Immersive Experiences

Installations, mixed reality showcases, spatial audio, and bespoke immersive storytelling for events, museums, and brand activations. If you can imagine it, we'll build it.

Who We Are

A studio that dives deeper

Dream Divers Interactive is an Adelaide-based creative technology studio that partners with forward-thinking businesses to design and build meaningful XR experiences.

We craft the environments, interactions, and narratives that make people stop and pay attention. From initial concept to final deployment, we are a genuine creative and technical partner.

Whether you need a VR training platform, an AR marketing activation, or something that doesn't have a name yet — we're the team to build it with.

20+
Projects delivered
5
XR disciplines
30+
Workshops produced
SA
Based in Adelaide

What we're built for

  • Unity & Unreal Engine development
  • Meta Quest, HoloLens, WebXR deployment
  • Web AR — MindAR, 8th Wall, Needle Engine
  • Real-time 3D environments & asset pipelines
  • Interactive narrative & game design
  • XR strategy, prototyping & user-centred design
  • End-to-end delivery & deployment support
  • Exhibition & event technology integration

The Team

People behind the experience

SJ
Saheb Singh Janjuha
Tech Lead & Gameplay Programmer
Unity & C# Specialist XR Developer
Saheb is the Tech Lead at Dream Divers Interactive and a creative XR developer with deep expertise in Unity, C#, and real-time interactive systems. He leads the technical direction across all studio builds — from architecture and performance optimisation to final deployment — ensuring every experience is not just functional, but exceptional.

With hands-on experience across VR, AR, 2D and 3D games, and hardware-integrated prototypes, Saheb brings a rare combination of technical depth and creative instinct. Whether it's crafting immersive VR worlds for Meta Quest, implementing hand-tracking interactions, building custom shader effects, or engineering complex real-time physics — he thrives at the intersection of engineering and experience design.
Unity & C#VR / AR / MRMeta Quest Hand TrackingShader GraphXR Toolkit Web ARNeedle Engine2D / 3D Games Real-time PhysicsPrototypingPerformance Optimisation
OC
Onnie Chan
Creative Director & Lead Designer
Women in Innovation Award 2024 SA Game Industry Award 2025 Founder, WiCT
Onnie is the Founder and Creative Director of Dream Divers Interactive. A graduate of The University of Adelaide with a Master of Immersive Media Technologies, she combines a background in theatre, immersive storytelling, and experience design with emerging technologies — creating digital experiences that are intuitive, memorable, and emotionally engaging.

As Founder of Women in Creative Technologies (WiCT) and a recognised leader in Australia's creative technology sector, Onnie has produced over 30 tech, gaming and AI workshops, collaborating with clients across business, education, government, tourism, healthcare, and cultural sectors. Her work is driven by a belief that great technology should tell meaningful stories, solve real-world challenges, and create lasting human impact.
Creative DirectionUX & Experience DesignVR / AR / MR Game DesignGamificationAI Integration Immersive StorytellingWorkshop FacilitationInclusive Tech
